title: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Fashion Editorial Photograph Stunning
sourceTitle: Ultra Realistic Cinematic Fashion Editorial Photograph Stunning

imagePrompts.prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion editorial photograph of a stunning young woman standing in the middle of an endless yellow wildflower field beside a vintage yellow convertible car. She has a sharp jawline, pale porcelain skin, short sleek black bob hair with a side part, piercing blue-grey eyes, bold matte red lips, soft glowing skin texture, and elegant facial features inspired by high-fashion European beauty editorials.

She wears an extravagant mustard-yellow couture tulle gown with dramatic layered ruffles, flowing fabric trails, fitted strapless corset bodice, luxurious textured details, and a sophisticated haute couture silhouette. The dress spreads elegantly across the flowers and grass, moving softly in the wind.

The woman poses confidently in a calm editorial stance, body slightly turned while looking directly into the camera with a dreamy, powerful expression. One hand gently touches her face while the other lightly holds the flowing gown. Minimal gold jewelry, long glossy black nails, luxury vogue-inspired styling, soft glamorous makeup with warm tones and defined eyes.

Behind her is a vintage yellow convertible parked naturally in the countryside landscape, roof down, blending perfectly with the warm yellow flower scenery. Golden hour sunlight, cinematic depth of field, soft breeze, highly detailed flowers and fabric texture, realistic shadows and highlights, photorealistic skin detail, DSLR quality, retro 1970s luxury campaign aesthetic, sophisticated cinematic color grading, ultra-sharp focus, magazine cover composition, elegant storytelling, Vogue editorial photography style, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, masterpiece quality.
